stem: The speed of a vehicle is increasing at a rate of 7.3 meters per second squared. What is this rate, in miles per minute squared, rounded to the nearest tenth? (Use 1 mile = 1,609 meters.)
explanation: Convert meters to miles by dividing by 1,609, and seconds² to minutes² by multiplying by 60² = 3,600: 7.3 × (1/1,609) × 3,600 ≈ 16.33. Rounded to the nearest tenth, that is 16.3 miles per minute squared.
